zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabel FitzWarin於1247年4月出生在英國史洛普爾廷頓時，她的父親Fulk FitzWarin III87歲，母親Clarice d'Auberville32歲。她於1263年4月6日之後與John de Tregoz II在英國賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1297年5月24日在英國英格蘭賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabel FitzWarin于1247年4月出生在英国史洛普爾廷頓时，她的父亲Fulk FitzWarin III87岁，母亲Clarice d'Auberville32岁。她于1263年4月6日之后与John de Tregoz II在英国賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1297年5月24日在英国英格兰賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabel FitzWarin was born in April 1247, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, her father, Fulk FitzWarin III, was 87 and her mother, Clarice d'Auberville, was 32. She married John de Tregoz II after 6 April 1263, in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 24 May 1297, in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabel FitzWarin est née en avril 1247, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Fulk FitzWarin III, avait 87 ans et sa mère, Clarice d'Auberville, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé John de Tregoz II après 6 avril 1263, à Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 mai 1297, à Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel FitzWarin è nata il nel aprile 1247 nel Whittington, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Fulk FitzWarin III, aveva 87 anni e sua madre, Clarice d'Auberville, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato John de Tregoz II dopo il 6 aprile 1263, nel Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Mabel FitzWarinが1247年4月にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンで生まれた時，父Fulk FitzWarin IIIは87歳，母Clarice d'Aubervilleは32歳であった。1263年4月6日以後にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウヤス ハロルドでJohn de Tregoz IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1297年5月24日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウヤス ハロルドで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabel FitzWarin(이)가 1247년 4월 영국 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Fulk FitzWarin III(은)는 87세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Clarice d'Auberville(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1263년 4월 6일 이후 영국 허퍼드실르 와이아스 하로드에서 John de Tregoz II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1297년 5월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 와이아스 하로드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel FitzWarin nasceu em abril de 1247, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Fulk FitzWarin III, tinha 87 anos e sua mãe, Clarice d'Auberville, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Tregoz II após 6 de abril de 1263, em Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. ro.Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England: Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabel FitzWarin родилась апрель 1247 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Fulk FitzWarin III было 87 лет, а матери, которую звали Clarice d'Auberville, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Tregoz II после 6 апрель 1263 г. в местности ювяс харолд, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 24 мая 1297 г. в местности ювяс харолд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.
